comments.body:
L3 raised : https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1779430462035469

Urgent — Orders are not imported in the app

COD Orders:
- #1020588 – Order is unfulfilled in Shopify, products are available/imported in the app, but the order is not imported in the app.
- #1020589 – Order is unfulfilled in Shopify, products are available/imported in the app, but the order is not imported in the app.
- #1020591 – Order is unfulfilled in Shopify, products are available/imported in the app, but the order is not imported in the app.
- #1020593 – Order is unfulfilled in Shopify, products are available/imported in the app, but the order is not imported in the app.



I also tried manually importing the orders, but they are still not imported . They are not in the “Not to Ship” section.

Could you please help check and import these orders on priority?

Store: aswini-ayur.myshopify.com
Ac ID: b8534ffd-ec34-4dba-beb6-5efc56ae1160

comments.body:
L3: @Athul Prakash @Veena We need to enable all the features/toggles for the Aswini stores that are currently enabled for Loveofindia (LOI).

Some of the main ones we recall are listed below; however, please verify and enable all toggles currently active for LOI (or) share the list of toggles enabled for LOI with us, we will review and confirm which ones to be enabled for Aswini:

• Print label sorting – Single Product orders on top and Multi-product orders at the bottom
• Select all orders across multiple pages
• Create Batch
• Search Batch in Label Batch
• Item Filter View
• Payment Type filter
• Tracking-related features (if any)
• Order report-related features (if any)
• Any other LOI-specific enabled toggles/features

Store 1: aswinihomeo.myshopify.com
Ac ID: 7fbdf046-543d-4cb7-8a25-c163ab8ff527

Store 2: aswini-ayur.myshopify.com
Ac ID: b8534ffd-ec34-4dba-beb6-5efc56ae1160
